cit.basis: Income Tax Act: 25% for unregulated companies; 33 1/3% (one third exactly, stored here as the IEEE-754 double for 1/3) for regulated companies such as banks, insurers and securities dealers.
cit.note: Administered by Tax Administration Jamaica (TAJ). 'Regulated' follows Bank of Jamaica / Financial Services Commission regulation.

vat.name: GCT
vat.note: General Consumption Tax (GCT) standard rate 15%; higher/special rates apply to telephony and tourism sectors.

minimum_business_tax.note: The Minimum Business Tax (MBT) was abolished effective year of assessment 2019.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
The regulated/unregulated classification, employment tax credit, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official TAJ guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
